final_answer:
### Frozen evidence audit (no LLM)

The frozen catalog yielded 15 query candidates in 4 conflict families; unclustered query controls: average_order_value, monthly_revenue_trend, weekly_new_customer_signups.

- Weekly revenue: 13.07% mean / 16.59% max; cumulative gap $28,917,693.
- Weekly order volume: 30.05% mean / 34.4% max; cumulative gap 34,651 orders.
- Weekly refunds: 3.11% mean / 15.14% max; cumulative gap $174,216.

All three live proofs matched the frozen manifest. This evidence-only run does not make or stage a canonical recommendation; the human approval gate remains unchanged.
